steps.description: Resolve the target root for target-local memory doctor checks.
Assemble Memory doctor status from declarative payload status policy for non-strict, non-verbose output.
Load the package-domain doctor report when verbose output or strict doc ownership is requested.
Emit the memory doctor payload in the requested format.

ir_plan.summary: Memory doctor non-strict, non-verbose text and JSON execute generated operation IR through a schema-backed payload.status primitive. Verbose and strict ownership behavior remains package-domain source runtime.

reads.surface: verbose flag for broad diagnostic output

steps.description: Resolve the target root for target-local memory doctor checks.
Assemble Memory doctor status from declarative payload status policy.
Load the package-domain doctor report when verbose output or strict doc ownership is requested.
Emit Memory doctor as JSON or install-result text without package-runtime formatting.
